title: Casino Rocket Additions - Unofficial Addon
description: More games for Casino Rocket mod
body:
**Casino Rocket - Additions** is an unofficial add-on developed to complement the **Casino Rocket** mod, expanding the Minecraft gameplay experience by adding new minigames, betting systems, and reward mechanics. Its main goal is to enrich the casino atmosphere within the game, offering more varied, interactive, and entertaining activities for players.

This add-on introduces an **American Roulette table**, a minigame based on the classic casino game. At this table, players can deposit chips or bills as a form of bet, select different types of bets, and adjust the amount they wish to wager before starting the round. Once the bet is placed, the player can spin the roulette wheel and wait for the result. Depending on the number, color, or combination selected, the system delivers rewards proportional to the type of bet placed, making each game an element of risk, strategy, and chance.

In addition to roulette, the add-on also includes a **bingo machine**, designed to offer a different and more relaxed gameplay experience. In this minigame, each player uses individual cards with assigned numbers. The machine draws random numbers without repetition, allowing the game to progress through rounds. Players must manually mark the numbers on their cards and pay attention to fulfilling the game's objectives. When a player completes the necessary combination, they can claim bingo and receive their respective reward.

Overall, **Casino Rocket - Additions** enhances the variety of activities available within the original mod, adding new forms of entertainment based on chance and player interaction. Thanks to its betting, reward, and game round systems, this add-on allows for the creation of more complete casino spaces within Minecraft, ideal for servers, themed maps, or multiplayer experiences focused on fun and friendly competition.
